Risk Description: Lack of a DR and BC plan, leading to prolonged downtime from major incident
Mitigation / Treatment Plan: Develop and document a DR/BC plan; implement and test offline backups.

Risk Description: No centralized IAM with MFA enabling account takeover
Mitigation / Treatment Plan: Procure and implement an IAM solution (e.g., Azure AD); enforce MFA for all users.

Risk Description: Outdated patches on critical servers exposing known exploits
Mitigation / Treatment Plan: Establish a formal patch management policy; automate patching where possible.

Risk Description: Lack of a centralized asset inventory
Mitigation / Treatment Plan: Deploy a network scanning tool to catalog all assets quarterly.
Purchase annual security awareness training for all employees.

Risk Description: Weak password policy increasing brute-force risks
Mitigation / Treatment Plan: Update the password policy to require 12+ characters and complexity.
